results.title: India declare at 564/8 as Pant falls short of ton, Afghanistan 28/1 at tea
results.description: At tea, Afghanistan reached 28 for 1 with debutant Manav Suthar getting his first Test wicket off his very first delivery when Abdul Malik (16) went for a slog sweep and Mohammed Siraj took a dolly at short leg.

results.title: 'We want to achieve something remarkable': Xhaka on Switzerland's WC ambitions
results.description: Switzerland's Granit Xhaka is calmness personified when talk turns to the FIFA World Cup 2026. It will be his fourth edition of the global showpiece, after Brazil 2014, Russia 2018 and Qatar 2022. The midfielder has featured in 12 World Cup matches -- a Swiss record -- and has worn the captain's armband since the end of 2019, something he does not take for granted.

results.title: Everton international roundup: Mixed night for O'Brien, Pickford starts drab England win

results.title: Rishabh Pant silences critics with blazing 81 as India reach 475 for 6 at lunch on Day 2
results.description: Going into the lunch break, Washington Sundar (14 batting) and debutant Manav Suthar (9 batting) were at the crease.

results.title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi’s parents to accompany 15-year-old on overseas tours with Team India
results.description: BCCI has asked Vaibhav Sooryavanshi’s parents to travel with him on overseas tours with Team India after he earned his maiden India call-up for the UK tour on Saturday.

results.title: View: Everton may face difficult truth with attacker as exit rumours intensify
results.description: Everton will have a big decision to make on the future of Iliman Ndiaye ahead of the summer transfer window.

results.title: Knicks are not satisfied; Spurs unwilling to quit
results.description: The New York Knicks are up 2-0. They say they're unfazed.

results.title: Journalist drops Marcus Rashford bombshell that many fans didn’t expect
results.description: Manchester United’s decision to remove Marcus Rashford from the first-team picture and push towards a sale was reportedly driven by the club, not simply by former head coach Ruben Amorim. That detail is important, because for a long time the story was framed as a manager-versus-player issue.
